precommit.quality: STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=d -- '*.php'); ([ -z "$STAGED" ] || echo "$STAGED" | xargs bin/php-cs-fixer fix --dry-run --diff --config=.php-cs-fixer.dist.php --path-mode=intersection) && ([ ! -f var/data/test.db ] && echo 'Skipping unit tests (no test DB)' || composer test:unit)
